focusPoints.label: Principal-level impact and leverage showing up
focusPoints.reason: Whether the Principal scope is translating into visible outcomes on this team, or if delivery is steady while impact is still not landing publicly.

focusPoints.label: Early expectation alignment for Principal scope
focusPoints.reason: Whether he understands what “good” looks like at Principal on this team right now, especially given prior feedback about needing earlier expectation alignment.

focusPoints.label: Cross-team trust and hard calls developing
focusPoints.reason: What you need to see at Principal level is growing judgment in ambiguous situations and stronger relationships beyond the immediate team.

focusPoints.label: Judgment calls on tradeoffs vs safe execution
focusPoints.reason: Whether he’s making and escalating the right tradeoffs for Principal scope, or staying in safe execution mode by asking fewer questions and waiting for direction.

name: Tom
notes: Tom moved teams recently and delivery is steady, but Principal-level impact is not visible yet. Previous feedback said he needs early expectation alignment, and he still asks very few questions. I want to test whether he understands what Principal scope means on this team or if he is still operating on old assumptions. I also need to understand whether cross-team trust and judgment calls are developing or whether he is staying in safe execution mode.
